name: Fisetin
summary: Fisetin is a flavonoid studied for senolytic and neuroprotective effects, mainly in preclinical models. Human clinical evidence remains minimal.
description: Flavonoid with preclinical senolytic, antioxidant, and anti-inflammatory activity; clinical evidence is not yet established.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
contraindications: known hypersensitivity to fisetin or related flavonoids
warfarin or other anticoagulant medications due to glucuronidation-based metabolism that may potentiate effect
diabetes medication or insulin due to blood sugar lowering effect demonstrated in animal studies
pregnancy or breastfeeding or use in children due to absence of human safety data
limited human clinical data overall warrants clinician guidance before combining with prescription medications metabolized by cytochrome P450 enzymes
